archive_data.question_text: Kavadi Aattam is a major folk dance form of which of the following states of India?

explanation.english: Kavadi Aattam is a traditional folk dance native to Tamil Nadu, performed as an offering to Lord Murugan.
explanation.tanglish: Kavadi Aattam endradhu Tamil Nadu ku uriya paerumaiyaana folk dance. Idhu Lord Muruganukku samarpanai seithu aattapadum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following nations won the third blind cricket World Cup T20 championship?

explanation.english: India won the third Blind Cricket World Cup T20 championship held in 2017.
explanation.tanglish: Moondraam Blind Cricket World Cup T20 vilaiyaattil India jeyichadhu.

archive_data.question_text: During the British era Indian economy was known as ________.

options.text: a source for its raw material
only a market for agricultural products
a source for finished capital goods

explanation.english: During British rule, India served primarily as a source of raw materials for British industries rather than a market for finished goods.
explanation.tanglish: British aachiyil India ore oru kalavai (raw material) moolaaga seithadhu, poorthi saaman thayarikka India moolaaga illai.

archive_data.question_text: After which incident did Mahatma Gandhi call off the non-cooperation movement?

explanation.english: Mahatma Gandhi called off the Non-Cooperation Movement following the Chauri Chaura incident in 1922 where police officers were killed.
explanation.tanglish: 1922 il Chauri Chaura sambavam nadandha piragu, Gandhi non-cooperation ai otrukki vaithaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is correct with respect to basketball?

options.text: Each team is made up of 11 players, with only 7 allowed on the court at any time.
Each team is made up of 12 players, with only 5 allowed on the court at any time.
Each team is made up of 11 players, with only 4 allowed on the court at any time.
Each team is made up of 12 players, with only 8 allowed on the court at any time.

explanation.english: In basketball, each team consists of 12 players but only 5 players are allowed on the court at any given time.
explanation.tanglish: Basketball vilaiyaattil oru kuzhuvil 12 aadiavarigal irukkanum, aanal courtil 5 mattum vilaiyaadanum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is INCORRECT regarding the collegium system?

options.text: This system started in the year 2007.
This system was evolved through Supreme Court judgment.
It recommends the appointments and transfers of judges.
It consists of Chief Justice and four senior judges of Supreme Court.

explanation.english: The Collegium System was established in 1993 through Supreme Court judgments (Second Judges Case), not in 2007.
explanation.tanglish: Collegium system 2007 il aarambikkavillai. Idhu 1993 il Supreme Court thiirppu moolama vandha system.

archive_data.question_text: The Communist Party of India was formed in 1925 at the first Party Conference in _________ .

explanation.english: The Communist Party of India was founded in 1925 at its first Party Conference held in Kanpur (Cawnpore).
explanation.tanglish: Communist Party of India 1925 il Kanpur la nadantha muthal pattimandral (conference) il udhavikka pattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the tides have variations in height?

explanation.english: Mixed tides exhibit variations in tidal height, showing characteristics of both semi-diurnal and diurnal tides with unequal high and low waters.
explanation.tanglish: Mixed tide endradhu kadal neerin uyaram matthamaaga (variations) irukkum tide.
